title: Permissions Family Skeleton
description: Skeleton only. Phase 1 Step 1 scaffold for the permissions family — role / SharePoint group / permission-level mappings, internal vs external posture, and ownership templates. Not fully populated. Full extraction occurs in later Phase 1 steps (Phase 1 Step 4 — Per-Family Schema Population). External (guest) users remain deferred from MVP — external-user permission templates exist as `mvp_status: deferred` placeholders only. Traces to Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy and Standard Project Site Template Contract §8, §13.
